description_long: This is a medium-sized, vertically oriented bag of potato chips labeled 'PAKER' in large white letters on a blue and white background. The front of the bag features an image of three ridged potato chips and text indicating the flavor as 'Salt & Vinegar' along with a note that it contains '30% less fat.' The packaging is made of glossy, flexible plastic, with the back displaying detailed nutritional information and ingredient lists in black and white panels. The sides of the bag are narrow and show the crimped seams typical of snack packaging. The top and bottom are sealed, and the bag appears partially filled with air to protect the chips inside. The overall appearance is clean and commercial, suitable for sale in urban convenience stores or vending machines.
description: A blue and white plastic bag of 'PAKER' Salt & Vinegar potato chips with a glossy finish and detailed labeling, featuring an image of ridged chips on the front.
description_view_0: The front view shows the 'PAKER' branding, flavor text, and an image of three potato chips, with a blue and white color scheme.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the narrow, crimped edge of the bag and a partial view of the nutritional facts panel.
description_view_2: The back view displays the full nutritional facts and ingredient lists, with no product imagery, dominated by blue and white colors.
description_view_3: The right side view shows the other crimped edge and a partial view of the front label and chip image.
attribute_brand_logo: A small, rectangular logo with a crown and orange elements is visible at the top right of the front face.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front of the bag clearly states 'Salt & Vinegar' as the flavor, with supporting imagery of potato chips.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: A detailed nutrition facts panel and ingredient list are visible on the back of the bag.
attribute_promotional_graphics: The front of the bag includes a '30% less fat' promotional marking in a blue box.
